productName: Full Spec - Elite - Cartridge - 1g - (Holidaze) (I) Sleigh Ride
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Sleigh Ride oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
